name: Autonomous Trading Loop Closure Agent
task: Make entire system (training → multi-TF eval + gates → promotion → paper/live with new Decision PPO + Execution layer) automatically arm and run with full supervisor + watcher oversight. Do not break simple_action legacy.
key_closures: handoff_watcher.py: _detect_execution_type, force env AGI_EXECUTION_TYPE=decision_ppo on promote, records in last_handoff + status + PIPELINE_DECISIONS
promote_candidate_to_paper.py: writes full rich meta (execution_type, mtf_context, best_features_source) to paper_harness_start.json; defaults decision_ppo

paper_mt5_execution_harness.py: reads meta, loads HybridBrain + best_features + mtf, from_ppo_action_meta adapter, ExecutionAgent path in loop + rollback, --execution-type CLI, real PPO inference for promoted candidates
vps_agi_supervisor.ps1 + auto_promote_candidate.ps1: handoff commands include decision_ppo + MTF/best_features envs; auto arm rich paper
Python/execution/*: TradeDecision (full spec), ExecutionAgent (MQL5 bridge + python fallback + force_flatten_all), from_ppo_action_meta, router accepts rich
drl/trading_env.py + hybrid_brain.py: decision_ppo_v1 decode + real rich action_meta from bundles
MQL5 EA + deploy: ExecutionCommandMode + v1_trade_decision protocol support (prep in deploy)
Rollback: force_flatten_all wired everywhere for new layer
how_to_verify: After next candidate: check paper_harness_start.json execution_type==decision_ppo, harness logs 'HybridBrain (Decision PPO)', execution_feedback.jsonl has decision_id, TUI shows rich decisions, MQL5 can attach with ExecutionCommandMode for bridge
no_breakage: All paths respect AGI_EXECUTION_TYPE; adapters (from_simple_intent, legacy decode) present; tests pass for simple_action
next: Live arming after paper validation; distill richer heads; feedback-to-retrain full attribution
